tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
for d in \
  tablenotes.com tablenotes.app \
  cornertable.com cornertable.app \
  cornerseat.com cornerseat.app \
  diningdispatch.com diningdispatch.app \
  editorstable.com editorstable.app \
  chefslist.com chefslist.app \
  menunotes.com menunotes.app \
  knowntable.com knowntable.app \
  tablepass.com tablepass.app \
  bookedtable.com bookedtable.app \
  diningbrief.com diningbrief.app \
  firstbite.com firstbite.app \
  chefsdesk.com chefsdesk.app \
  propertable.com propertable.app \
  gildedfork.com gildedfork.app \
  goldenhour.menu \
  hiddentable.com hiddentable.app \
  chefspass.com chefspass.app \
  tastepass.com tastepass.app \
  platepass.com platepass.app \
  menupass.com menupass.app \
  tablereport.com tablereport.app \
  tableedit.com tableedit.app \
  dinehaus.com dinehaus.app \
  palato.com palato.app \
  tavolata.com tavolata.app \
  aperto.com aperto.app \
  sitdown.app sitdown.menu \
  rapport.menu \
  maitre.app maitre.menu \
  chefstable.app \
  gastronotes.com gastronotes.app \
  firstseating.com firstseating.app \
  lastseating.com lastseating.app \
  diningroom.app \
  tableguide.com tableguide.app; do
  check "$d"
done
